HGSS.254.0000:
A comfy bed!
Time to sleep...\f
HGSS.254.0002:
Fast Ship S.S. Aqua
has arrived in Olivine City.
HGSS.254.0003:
Fast Ship S.S. Aqua
has arrived in Vermilion City.
HGSS.254.0004:
Zzz... Zzz...\f
Wh-what?
I’m awake, of course...\f
Zzz... Zzz...
HGSS.254.0005:
What? You’re saying I was asleep?
Show some respect!\f
A crewman on duty would never
be so unmindful as to take a nap\r
in a place like this!\f
I resent your implication!
I challenge you!\f
HGSS.254.0006:
Losing to you has woken me up.
I will mend my ways and work hard.\f
Can you keep it a secret that I was
taking a nap here?\r
Please don’t tell the Captain.\f
